transcription.text: Greenfield Auto Repair, this is Sarah. Hi Sarah, my name is Jennifer. I just moved to the area and my Honda Civic needs an oil change and tire rotation. Welcome to the neighborhood! We can get you in tomorrow at 10 AM. Does that work? That's perfect. How much will it be? Oil change is $45 and tire rotation is $25, so $70 total. Great, sign me up. Wonderful, we've got you down for tomorrow at 10. See you then!
transcription.summary:
